testcase.name: addEmployee

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: By.xpath: //div[normalize-space()='Practice'] (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: By.xpath: //div[normalize-space()='Practice'] (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) at com.Hrms.utils.TestNgUtility.assertFail(TestNgUtility.java:30) at com.Hrms.utils.CommonUtils.waitForElementToBeVisible(CommonUtils.java:270) at com.Hrms.utils.CommonUtils.moveToElement(CommonUtils.java:286) at com.Hrms.tests.TestPIMPage.addEmployee(TestPIMPage.java:41) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 28 stack frames
